name: Salted Pumkin Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the seeds from the fibres.
2. Spread seeds on a flat, shallow pan (such as a jelly roll sheet).
3. Pour melted butter over the seeds and sprinkle with salt.
4. Bake in a slow oven (250°F) until the seeds are dried out and crispy brown. Stir occasionally to toast evenly.
